g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does DirectoryLoader and PyPDFLoader work in LangChain?')
sendPrompt('What chunking strategy did we use and why 1000 chars with 200 overlap?')
sendPrompt('Why did we choose BAAI/bge-large-en-v1.5 for embeddings and why run it on GPU?')
sendPrompt('How does ChromaDB persist vectors to disk and reload them?')
sendPrompt('How does the user query flow through the RAG pipeline in app.py?')
sendPrompt('What is HyDE and multi-query retrieval and how would we add it to app.py?')
sendPrompt('Why did we use MMR retriever instead of basic similarity search?')
sendPrompt('What is cross-encoder reranking and how does it improve RAG precision?')
sendPrompt('What is contextual compression in RAG and how does LLMChainExtractor work?')
sendPrompt('Why did we choose llama-3.1-70b via Groq over other LLMs?')
sendPrompt('How does our RAG system add source citations to the final answer?')
sendPrompt('How is the Streamlit UI connected to the RAG chain in app.py?')
sendPrompt('How does RunnableWithMessageHistory work for conversational memory?')
sendPrompt('Explain the 4 RAGAS metrics — faithfulness, relevancy, precision, recall')
